title: Ted
reviews: Surprisingly heartfelt comedy about friendship
MacFarlane's crude humor works perfectly
Laughed until my stomach hurt
Childish premise becomes genuinely touching
Perfect blend of raunchy and sweet
Nostalgia trip wrapped in profanity

Refreshingly honest about arrested development
Immature humor masks deeper life truths
Guilty pleasure that's actually brilliant
Ridiculous concept executed with perfect timing
Adult comedy disguised as childhood fantasy
Cleverly balances immaturity with genuine wisdom
Offensive yet oddly wholesome viewing experience
Crass humor conceals surprisingly sincere message
Laughed harder than expected honestly
